confidenceReason: Four recent multi-session efforts were traced; chat history could not be inspected directly, only its artifacts.
evidenceSummary: Long-running work relies on chat scrollback; durable progress records exist for only one of four recent efforts.

basis.statement: The missing records are confirmed; the impact projection assumes a handoff or compaction event occurs mid-effort.

findings.condition: Three of four recent multi-session efforts kept decisions and remaining work only in conversation; one kept a durable progress note.

criteria.criterion: In-flight efforts keep durable records of decisions, remaining work, and verification status.

effect.statement: An interruption forces rediscovery of decisions already made, risking repeated or contradicted work.

evidence.statement: The traced efforts show tracker entries opened and closed with no interim state; the one durable note enabled a clean resume.

findings.statement: In-flight decisions live in chat scrollback and would not survive a cold handoff.

summary: Long-running work relies on chat scrollback; durable progress records exist for only one of four recent efforts.
